changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Clean up existing duplicate event_ticket_transaction records before adding unique constraint
changeSet.sql: WITH records_to_keep AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (stripe_payment_intent_id) id FROM event_ticket_transaction WHERE stripe_payment_intent_id IS NOT NULL AND stripe_payment_intent_id != '' ORDER BY stripe_payment_intent_id, CASE WHEN first_name IS NOT NULL AND first_name != '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN qr_code_image_url IS NOT NULL AND qr_code_image_url != '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN tenant_id != 'tenant_demo_001' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, created_at DESC ) DELETE FROM event_ticket_transaction WHERE stripe_payment_intent_id IS NOT NULL AND stripe_payment_intent_id != '' AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM records_to_keep);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Add unique index on stripe_payment_intent_id to prevent future duplicates

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Add documentation comment to the index
changeSet.sql: COMMENT ON INDEX ux_event_ticket_stripe_payment_intent IS 'Unique constraint to prevent duplicate ticket transactions for the same Stripe payment intent. Added Nov 2025 to fix race condition between webhook and polling.';
